narrative:
Mercer County has 28,907 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.8% of registrants.
